name: spec_index2va_bitand_not_shift
code:
proof fn phi_2_spec_index2va_bitand_not_shift(l4i: L4Index, l3i: L3Index, l2i: L2Index, l1i: L1Index)
    requires
        l4i <= 0x1ff,
        l3i <= 0x1ff,
        l2i <= 0x1ff,
        l1i <= 0x1ff,
    ensures
        spec_index2va((l4i, l3i, l2i, l1i)) == 0,
{
}
reason: spec_index2va uses `&` (bitwise AND) between shifted components instead of `|` (bitwise OR) — ANDing shifted non-overlapping fields together produces zero, making all virtual address computations collapse to 0
